name: SellYourAuto.ca
tagline: Sell Your Car for the Best Price.
description: Canada's premier destination for selling your vehicle with speed, ease, and confidence.

about.heading:
Canada's Smarter Way
To Sell Your Car.
about.body1: We built SellYourAuto.ca because selling a car in Canada shouldn't require weeks of listings, sketchy test drives, or lowball dealership trade-ins. Our lightning-fast appraisal system puts a real offer in your hands within minutes — backed by real market data.
about.body2: From Halifax to Vancouver, we've helped thousands of Canadians get top dollar for their vehicles with zero stress, zero hidden fees, and zero games. Fill out the form, get your offer, and we'll handle the rest.

pillars.title: Transparent Pricing
pillars.desc: Real market data, honest numbers — no bait and switch.

pillars.title: Lightning Fast
pillars.desc: Appraisal in minutes. Pickup scheduled within 48 hours.

pillars.title: Zero Fees
pillars.desc: We pay you. No commissions, no listing fees, no surprises.

howItWorks.heading:
Three Steps to
Your Best Offer.

steps.title: Describe Your Vehicle
steps.desc: Fill out our smart form with your car's year, make, model, mileage, and condition. Upload a few photos to maximize your offer.

steps.title: Receive Your Offer
steps.desc: Our appraisal engine analyzes real-time market data and delivers a guaranteed offer — typically within minutes of submission.

steps.title: Get Paid & We Pick Up
steps.desc: Accept your offer, choose a pickup time, and we handle the rest. Payment is issued on the spot. It really is that simple.

footer.disclaimer: SellYourAuto.ca operates coast to coast across Canada.
